projects.name: Townino
projects.description: Townino helps local stores become discoverable in AI search. It organizes core business facts—name, address, hours, phone, and menu—into a machine-readable page so ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and Claude can surface accurate recommendations to real customer questions.

en.name: Townino
en.description: Townino helps local stores become discoverable in AI search. It organizes core business facts—name, address, hours, phone, and menu—into a machine-readable page so ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and Claude can surface accurate recommendations to real customer questions.

ko.name: 타운이노
ko.description: Townino는 동네 가게 정보를 AI 검색에 맞게 정리해 노출을 높여주는 서비스입니다. 상호, 주소, 영업시간, 연락처, 메뉴 같은 핵심 정보를 구조화해 ChatGPT·Gemini·Perplexity·Claude 같은 AI가 실제 손님 질문에 더 정확하게 추천할 수 있도록 돕습니다.

projects.name: Thinka
projects.description: A minimalist, intelligent app designed to help you capture and organize your thoughts effortlessly. Features voice recording, AI transcription and summarization, project-based organization, and professional document generation. Transform ideas into insights with seamless voice and text input support, simple gesture controls, and unlimited projects with Thinka Pro subscription.

en.name: Thinka
en.description: A minimalist, intelligent app designed to help you capture and organize your thoughts effortlessly. Features voice recording, AI transcription and summarization, project-based organization, and professional document generation. Transform ideas into insights with seamless voice and text input support, simple gesture controls, and unlimited projects with Thinka Pro subscription.

ko.name: 씽크카
ko.description: 생각을 쉽게 기록하고 정리할 수 있도록 돕는 미니멀한 AI 앱입니다. 음성 녹음, AI 전사/요약, 프로젝트 기반 정리, 문서 생성 기능을 통해 아이디어를 통찰로 바꿉니다.

projects.name: K-Random Trip
projects.description: Discover Korea the spontaneous way with no plans needed. K-Random Trip helps you explore Korea like never before with just a tap. From local street food to hidden scenic spots, from cozy cafés to quirky alleyways, your next destination is a surprise waiting to be discovered. Whether you're in Seoul, Busan, Jeju, or somewhere in between, let the app guide you to unexpected places full of charm with fresh, unfiltered recommendations.

en.name: K-Random Trip
en.description: Discover Korea the spontaneous way with no plans needed. K-Random Trip helps you explore Korea like never before with just a tap. From local street food to hidden scenic spots, from cozy cafés to quirky alleyways, your next destination is a surprise waiting to be discovered. Whether you're in Seoul, Busan, Jeju, or somewhere in between, let the app guide you to unexpected places full of charm with fresh, unfiltered recommendations.

ko.name: K-Random Trip
ko.description: 플랜 없이 즉흥적으로 한국을 탐험하는 여행 앱입니다. 로컬 스트리트 푸드부터 숨겨진 명소, 아늑한 카페까지 한 번의 탭으로 제안합니다.

projects.name: Tidily
projects.description: Turn chaos into calm in seconds. Tidily's privacy-first AI analyzes everything in your photo—whether it's a desk, shelf, room, or drawer—then renders a realistic 'after' view and gives you an easy action list. Features realistic before/after comparison for any space, smart storage & décor suggestions tailored to what you own, progress tracker and history timeline for lasting habits. All photos stay encrypted on your device with full privacy control.

en.name: Tidily
en.description: Turn chaos into calm in seconds. Tidily's privacy-first AI analyzes everything in your photo—whether it's a desk, shelf, room, or drawer—then renders a realistic 'after' view and gives you an easy action list. Features realistic before/after comparison for any space, smart storage & décor suggestions tailored to what you own, progress tracker and history timeline for lasting habits. All photos stay encrypted on your device with full privacy control.

ko.name: 티들리
ko.description: 사진 한 장으로 복잡한 공간을 정돈 가능한 상태로 바꾸는 AI 정리 앱입니다. 공간별 before/after 비교, 수납/인테리어 추천, 진행 이력까지 제공합니다.

projects.name: myDB
projects.description: Manage your items with one photo using AI analysis and organization. Smart tool for recording and managing all your possessions with automatic image analysis that extracts product names, models, and manufacturers from packaging or labels. Features multiple category support for electronics, wines, books, easy search & filtering, data-driven insights for consumer trends, and shopping list creation. Perfect for warranty tracking, wine collection management, and building personal databases.

en.name: myDB
en.description: Manage your items with one photo using AI analysis and organization. Smart tool for recording and managing all your possessions with automatic image analysis that extracts product names, models, and manufacturers from packaging or labels. Features multiple category support for electronics, wines, books, easy search & filtering, data-driven insights for consumer trends, and shopping list creation. Perfect for warranty tracking, wine collection management, and building personal databases.

ko.name: myDB
ko.description: 사진 기반으로 소유 품목을 자동 태깅해 분류하는 AI 자산 관리 도구입니다. 검색, 분류, 소비 패턴 인사이트, 쇼핑 리스트까지 한 번에 관리합니다.

projects.name: Then Weather
projects.description: Weather-based travel destination recommendation service that analyzes weather data from around the world to recommend optimal travel destinations. Find regions that match your desired temperature and weather conditions for specific dates, or check past weather patterns for planned destinations to make more informed travel plans.

en.name: Then Weather
en.description: Weather-based travel destination recommendation service that analyzes weather data from around the world to recommend optimal travel destinations. Find regions that match your desired temperature and weather conditions for specific dates, or check past weather patterns for planned destinations to make more informed travel plans.

ko.name: Then Weather
ko.description: 전 세계 날씨 데이터를 기반으로 원하는 조건의 여행 지역을 추천하고, 예정 여행지의 과거 날씨까지 확인할 수 있는 여행 추천 서비스입니다.

projects.name: Tent DB
projects.description: A minimalist Pomodoro timer that adapts to your work rhythm. FocusFlow tracks your focus sessions, identifies your peak productivity hours, and gently nudges you back when distracted. Features customizable work/break intervals, session history with weekly analytics, ambient soundscapes, and a widget for the home screen. No accounts, no cloud — everything stays on your device.
